"ImageRepositorySymbol": { "Repository": "{\r\n \"Folders\": [],\r\n \"Images\": [],\r\n \"Version\": 1\r\n}",
"ImportMetadata": {},
"Name": "imgrepo"
},
"ConnectionReferences": []
}
SET box TO $'''C:\\Users\\gotshota\\Downloads'''
SET 環境 TO $'''fsio365'''
SET 退避先 TO $'''sites/OJT-gotou/TaihiDocument'''
SET ページタイﾄル TO $'''OJT-後藤T'''
SET 退避先ドキュメントライブラリ TO $'''TaihiDocument'''
SET 退避移動 TO $'''%ページタイﾄル% - %退避先ドキュメントライブラリ%'''
SET 退避 TO 1
Excel.LaunchExcel.LaunchAndOpenUnderExistingProcess Path: $'''%box%\\PAD.xlsx''' Visible: True ReadOnly: False UseMachineLocale: False Instance=> ExcelInstance
Excel.ReadFromExcel.ReadAllCells Instance: ExcelInstance GetCellContentsMode: Excel.GetCellContentsMode.TypedValues FirstLineIsHeader: False RangeValue=> ExcelData
Excel.CloseExcel.Close Instance: ExcelInstance
Variables.AddColumnToDataTable.AppendColumnToDataTable DataTable: ExcelData ColumnName: $'''連番'''
SET a TO 0
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem7 IN ExcelData
Variables.ModifyDataTableItem DataTable: ExcelData ColumnNameOrIndex: $'''連番''' RowIndex: a Value: a
Variables.IncreaseVariable Value: a IncrementValue: 1
END
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem IN ExcelData
Variables.AddItemToList Item: CurrentItem['Column2'] List: パス
END
Variables.RemoveDuplicateItemsFromList List: パス IgnoreCase: False
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem2 IN パス[1:]
SET 退避Text TO $'''Taihi%退避%'''
Folder.Create FolderPath: box FolderName: 退避Text Folder=> NewFolder
Folder.Create FolderPath: box FolderName: $'''%退避Text%_next''' Folder=> NewFolder2
WAIT 3
Variables.FilterDataTable DataTable: ExcelData FilterParameters: { ^['RULE', 'COLUMN', 'OPERATOR', 'VALUE'], [$'''''', $'''Column2''', $'''Equal''', CurrentItem2] } MatchCase: True FilteredDataTable=> FilteredDataTable
WAIT 3
IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount > 0 THEN
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem3 IN FilteredDataTable
WAIT 5
WebAutomation.LaunchChrome.LaunchChromeNoWait Url: $'''https://%環境%.sharepoint.com/%CurrentItem3['Column2']%/%CurrentItem3['Column1']%''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Maximized ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"ローカル コンピューター\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
WAIT 6
WebAutomation.CloseWebBrowser BrowserInstance: Browser
System.RunApplication.RunApplication ApplicationPath: $'''explorer.exe''' CommandLineArguments: box WindowStyle: System.ProcessWindowStyle.Maximized ProcessId=> AppProcessId
WAIT 10
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''{Space}''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 10 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'ダウンロード - エクスプローラー\'']['Button \'切り取り\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'ダウンロード - エクスプローラー\'']['Edit \'名前\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.DoubleClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'youtube_powerplatform-main - エクスプローラー\'']['List \'項目ビュー\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.DoubleClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''{Control}({V})''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 10 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
WAIT 3
UIAutomation.CloseWindow.CloseByTitleClass Title: $'''%退避Text% - エクスプローラー''' Class: $'''CabinetWClass'''
END
END
Folder.GetFiles Folder: $'''%box%\\%退避Text%''' FileFilter: $'''*.xls''' IncludeSubfolders: False FailOnAccessDenied: True SortBy1: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending1: False SortBy2: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending2: False SortBy3: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending3: False Files=> Files_xls
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem_xls IN Files_xls
Excel.LaunchExcel.LaunchAndOpenUnderExistingProcess Path: CurrentItem_xls Visible: True ReadOnly: False UseMachineLocale: False Instance=> ExcelInstance
UIAutomation.FocusWindow.FocusByInstanceOrHandle WindowInstance: ExcelInstance
Excel.SaveExcel.SaveAs Instance: ExcelInstance DocumentFormat: Excel.ExcelFormat.OpenXmlWorkbook DocumentPath: $'''%CurrentItem_xls.Directory%_next\\%CurrentItem_xls.NameWithoutExtension%.xlsx'''
WAIT 3
Excel.CloseExcel.Close Instance: ExcelInstance
END
Folder.GetFiles Folder: $'''%box%\\%退避Text%''' FileFilter: $'''*.ppt''' IncludeSubfolders: False FailOnAccessDenied: True SortBy1: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending1: False SortBy2: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending2: False SortBy3: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending3: False Files=> Files_ppt

IF AttributeValue = $'''true''' THEN
